title: The Scorpion
content:
The Scorpion is as black as soot,
    He dearly loves to bite;
    He is a most unpleasant brute
    To find in bed at night.
meaning:
Hilaire Belloc's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "The Scorpion"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
